Mary Poppins Returns (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $171,958,438Details
International Box Office $173,648,062
Worldwide Box Office $345,606,500
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,555,749
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $23,401,325
Total $31,957,074
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The mysterious Mary Poppins returns to Depression-era London to visit Jane and her brother Michael, now a father of three, and helps them rediscover the joy they knew as children.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$23,523,121 (13.7% of total gross)
Legs:6.06 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:49.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$130,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,090 opening theaters/4,090 max. theaters, 6.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $225,281,263

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 19th, 2018 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: December 20th, 2018 (Wide), released as Il ritorno di Mary Poppins (Italy)
December 20th, 2018 (Wide) (Switzerland)
December 21st, 2018 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
December 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Netherlands)
December 21st, 2018 (Wide) (Poland)
Video Release: March 12th, 2019 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG for some mild thematic elements and brief action.
(Rating bulletin 2538 (Cert #51649), 8/1/2018)
Running Time: 130 minutes
Franchise: Mary Poppins
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animated Sequences, Legacy Sequel, Sequels Without Their Original Stars
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Plot point: Nanny
Social setting: Supernatural, World War II
Subgenre: Family Musical
Time period setting: 1930s
Source:Based on Fiction Book/Short Story
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Lucamar, Marc Platt Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

The mysterious Mary Poppins returns to Depression-era London to visit Jane and her brother Michael, now a father of three, and helps them rediscover the joy they knew as children.
